description: Code review agent workflow — thorough analysis with actionable feedback

phases.name: orient
phases.instruction: Understand the codebase context. Search memory for past review patterns and known issues.

phases.name: analyze
phases.instruction: Read the code thoroughly. Check for correctness, security, performance, and maintainability. Look for edge cases.

phases.name: evaluate
phases.instruction: Assess against coding standards. Check for common vulnerabilities. Verify error handling. Consider scalability.

phases.name: report
phases.instruction: Provide structured feedback with specific line references. Categorize issues by severity. Suggest concrete fixes.

success_criteria: All issues are categorized by severity. Each issue has a specific location and suggested fix. No false positives.
escalation_triggers: A security vulnerability requires immediate attention
The code has fundamental design issues beyond incremental fixes
